circle.style: fill: var(--icon-fill, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0)); opacity: var(--icon-fill-opacity, 1); stroke-width: 0px;

path.style: fill: none; stroke: var(--icon-stroke-color, currentColor); stroke-miterlimit: 10; stroke-width:var(--icon-stroke-width-m, calc(var(--icon-stroke-width, 5) * 1));

line.style: fill: var(--icon-line-color, currentColor); stroke: var(--icon-stroke-color, currentColor); stroke-miterlimit: 10; stroke-width:var(--icon-stroke-width-m, calc(var(--icon-stroke-width, 5) * 1));

fill: var(--icon-line-color, currentColor); stroke: var(--icon-stroke-color-secondary, var(--icon-stroke-color, currentColor)); stroke-miterlimit: 10; stroke-width:var(--icon-stroke-width-secondary-m, var(--icon-stroke-width-m, calc(var(--icon-stroke-width, 5) * 1)));

circle.style: fill: none; stroke: var(--icon-stroke-color-secondary, var(--icon-stroke-color, currentColor)); stroke-miterlimit: 10; stroke-width:var(--icon-stroke-width-secondary-m, var(--icon-stroke-width-m, calc(var(--icon-stroke-width, 5) * 1)));
